name: Prevention's Spinach-Yogurt Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 cup plain nonfat yogurt, or more
recipeInstructions:
1. Select fresh, baby spinach. Remove stems. Wash and rinse. Chop coarsely. Set aside.
2. In a large, no-stick saute pan over low heat, sweat the onion in the oil until translucent, about 3 minutes. Add chopped spinach and cook until all water has evaporated (about 2 minutes). Add minced garlic at the end to avoid burning.
3. Remove from heat. Place in a medium bowl to cool. When cool, mix with yogurt and sprinkle with mint, walnuts, and cayenne.
